preferredDeck: Settings and Map stay smoother, with clearer renderer health telemetry
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
editorialNotes: Approved after v26.5.1016-dev failed before packaging, then refreshed for v26.5.1101-dev after the dense Map movement paint fix landed, v26.5.1102-dev after the Settings moving chrome paint fix landed, and v26.5.1103-dev after the renderer hidden timer telemetry cleanup landed.
